fieldguide.variantsandventures.murk.desc: In warm oceans and trial chambers lurk the Murk, skeletons whose bones have recalcified into coral. Shear them to snag the coral for yourself!
fieldguide.variantsandventures.thicket.d: Thickets are Zombies covered in poisonous thorns, causing their wounds to infect and fester. Find them in jungles and in deep underground trials.
fieldguide.variantsandventures.gelid.des: The Gelid are frozen Zombies covered head-to-toe in frigid frost, inflicting their perpetual chill upon any wandering through cold biomes or tough trials.
fieldguide.variantsandventures.verdant.d: Skeletons native to the jungle and tangled with vines, the Verdant shoot poisonous arrows and hide in the shadows of the treetops.
